subcodes.first_line: Thou hast written about the sum belonging to Hadrat-i-Varaqiy-i-'Ulya… Whatever was sent, hath been received.
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و شکر اولیا و اصفیاء حق را لایق و سزاست آنانکه کوثر حیوان را که از قلم
subcodes.subjects: @Hands of the Cause, @Shrines and Holy places, @praise and encouragement, @business; financial; property matters, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
